titleStmt.title: SII 9.197: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 197. (A.R. No. 50 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 44, Vikāri, Vaiśākha, amāvāsye, Ādityavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1119 May 11 Sunday, on which day there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. Mārtaṇḍayya-Nāyaka, son of Māḷapa-Nāyaka who was the son of the Brāhman Kēśavarāja of Vāji-vamśa and of Śrīvatsa-gōtra is said to have caused the construction of a Śiva temple, consecrated the god Mārtāṇḍēśvara and granted some plots of land for the service of the god, in the presence of the Daṇḍāsanī Yaśōdhara-Brahmachārī and the five Vargas of Koṭṭitoṇe. He is stated to have caused the construction of the temples of Sarasvatī and Vināyaka and a beautiful sabhāmaṇṭapa with an Indra lamp-post. He also made provision for the feeding of ascetics in the temple. Māchi-Gāvuṇḍa, son of Baddemayya, made a gift of some plots of land for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīrjayaścābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgravi
śrānta(ṁ)bhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . namaḥ svāmikumārāya daipyattārakavidviṣē . Adhaṣkṛtamayūrāya bāṇādya
dhikaśaktayē . pātu vō viśvavighnaikakhaṁḍanaṟphaṇimaṁḍanaḥ saṁpāditajagammakhyavaṁdanasthāṇunaṁdanaḥ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire . vri . pararāyarjjīyenuttōlagisalarasugeydoppidaṁ vīralakṣmīpariraṁbhōjjaiṁbhavāṁtadbhujanamama kha
ḷiṁgāṁgavaṁgēśvarōrvvīdharavajraṁ bāppu sāmānyavē jagabirudaṁ rāyakōḷāhaḷaṁ rāyaradēvaṁ rāya
nārāyaṇanatuḷabaḷaṁ rāyapermmāḍidēvaṁ . paranṛpara bhujastaṁbhāṁtaraṁgaḷoḷu vijayalakṣmigiligiligaṁbaṁ
piridalasi vikramāṁkasthirabāhustaṁbhaśāḷabhaṁjikeyādaḷu . va . Enisi negarttevetta rāyarudappanakhaṁḍabhū
maṁḍaḷamaṁ tanna bhujadaṁḍamaṁḍitamaṁḍaḷāgradiṁduṁḍigesādhyaṁ māḍi paripāḷisuttamire samastadharmmaṁgaḷoḷesava śivadha
rmanirmmāṇamaṁ nirmmisuvenadeṁteṁdoḍe . jaḷajajakuladoḷu kulamavu palavoḷavavaṟoḷage paramapāvanamene ni
rmmaḷatevaḍedesakaduttamakulamoppuva vājikulamagaṇyaṁ puṇyaṁ . Enaleseva vājikuḷadoḷaganaghacaritraṁ supu
tranudiyisidaṁ satyanidhānanuttamaṁ sajjanavinutaṁ kēsirājanasadṛṣatējaṁ . bhuvanaprastutyadiṁ satyadina
nupamasanmānadiṁ dānadiṁ sāravacōvistāradiṁ vīradinatibaḷasauṁdaryyadiṁ kāryyadiṁ kēśavarājaṁ rājanāmaṁ
negaḷdakhiḷaguṇabhrājitaṁ vājivaṁśārṇnavarājamānyarājaṁ sujanasubhaṭarājaṁ dharādēvarājaṁ . śrīvatsagōtra
tiḷakaṁ bhūvinutaviśuddhakīrtti kīrttiviḷāsaṁ pāvanacaritaṁ sujanaradēvaṁ kēvaḷave negaḷda kēśavarājaṁ .
Aṁtanisidesakadoḷu guṇamaṁ tāḷdida kēsirājanagratanūja kāntāmanōjanatiśayaśāṁta satyābhimānaśī
ḷaṁ māḷaṁ . vineyaṁ nītiparōpakārabhaṟitasaujanyamānyapravarttanavācāravudāra vīravibhavasatyābhi
mānabrajaṁ tanagaṁgīkritameṁbinaṁ negaḷda sajjanasantānavasuṁdharāvaradiśāśuṁḍāḷapaṁ māḷapaṁ .
vipuḷayaśōnidhi māḷapanupacita guṇagaṇalalanālapana sarasīruhavikaśanatada
śrīvatsagōtranamaḷacaritraṁ . kulavanitājanavaṁdita kulavanitābharaṇe kulavadhūttameyeṁdaṁdolaviṁ pogaḷvudu
māḷana kulavanitayanarasikabbeyaṁ bhuvanajanaṁ . Ā negaḷda māḷapaṁgaṁ mānini guṇadarasikabbegaṁ puṭṭidano
ḷmānasikaṁ negaḷe puruśanidhānamārttaṁḍanesekadesevinagaṇḍaṁ sajjanasanmānadānōnnatanatuḷabaḷōllāsi saujanya
mānyabrajamitraṁ gōtranistārakanatiśaya bhirāmaṁ bhujabāḷpaṁ jagaṁ baṇnisa jasavese
datyuttamaṁ vājivaṁśāṁbujamārttaṇḍaṁ jaganmaṁḍana mārttaṇḍanājipraca(ṁ)ṇḍa . pesaruṁ peṁpumudāttasatyaguṇa
muṁ vīratvamuṁ tatvamuṁ jasamuṁ dharmmamumārppumala nōḍa nōḍalke mānasane mānasarū
pugoṁḍamaraneṁdendēḷidaṁ māḍirāḍisuva nāḍaṟiyalu vivēkanidhi mārttaṇḍaṁ jaganmaṁḍana . piḍiyalaṇavolla
nolaviṁ piḍidoḍe biḍaneḍaṟaneḍaṟi māṇaṁ muḷisi toḍaraṁ toḍarddaḍe seḍeyade toḍardda tōḷuṟadiṟivagaṇḍanī mā
rttaṇḍa . Uttamapuralakṣmiya saṁpattidenalu koṭṭittoṇeyiṁ baḍagaṇa bayaloḷu bittarada vastuguṇadiṁdettaṁ celve
sadu nerevasantada neleyoḷu . Ī sakaḷadharitriyoḷatibhāsurataramenipa pesara janapadajanadiṁ jasava
ḍedeseva vividhaviḷāsadakaṇi dharmmabhūmi ramyamidenutaṁ . śivadharmmamiduve dharmmam śivadēvane dēvaneṁba naṁbuge mige celvava
tarisire māḍisidaṁ śivagṛhamaṁ bhūpracaṁḍanī mārttaṇḍa . Artti migalmāhēśvaravarttakameseyalsamastadhārmmikarellaṁ
kīrttisuttire māḍisidaṁ mārttaṇḍēśvaramanesediralu mārttaṇḍa . Aṟanaṟidu bāvi dēgulavaṟikeya vā
ṇīgrihaṁ vināyakaniḷeyaṁ peṟagaṇa tōṭaṁ celviṁ neṟediṟe māḍisidanesediralu mārttaṇḍaṁ . vipuḷajananiḷa
yamaṁṭapamapāraśōbhāguṇābhirāmalatāmaṁṭapamenaleseva sutrāmadīpamaṁ māḍisidanesevinam mā
rttaṁḍaṁ . Eseva sabhāmaṁṭapama vasudhege kaḍucōdyavene jagaṁ baṇnise celvesedire karamoppuva baluvesadim māḍisidanesevinaṁ mārtta(ṁ)ṇḍaṁ . ©
svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda bratajapaniyamahōmasaṁyuktaruṁ śrīsvāmikārttikēyadēvatapō
vanādhipatigaḷappa śrīmaddaṁḍāsani yaśōdharabrahmacāriyarasaru svastyānēkayugavarttamāna
mānamahimāspadamahāprasiddhasuddhānvayarssamastadēsigajanādhārar śrīsvāmikārttikē
yadēvapādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa śrīmatkoṭṭitoṇeya sthānadayduṁ varggamumirddu svasti śrīmaccā
ḷukyavikramavarṣada 44 neya vikārisaṁvatsarada vaiśākhadamāvāśyeyāditya
vāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇanimittadiṁ śrīmanmārttaṁḍēśvaradēvara pūjāvidhānakkaṁ nivēdyakkavalliya naiṣṭikatapōdhanarāhā
radānakkaṁ khaṁḍitasphuṭitajīrnnōddhārakkaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi dhārāpūrvvakam māḍi kuḍalu mārttaṁḍayya
nāyakaṁ paḍedu biṭṭa sthaḷaṁ karuvanakēriyādityadēvara keyyiṁ pattire baḍaga tōraṇagāpuṁḍageyi navilamattaru
hattu kamma 44 ṟa bhuje paḍuva 27 baḍaga 1 . mūḍa 24 . teṁka 87 . mattaru mattamōrvāya baṭṭeyiṁ pattire mūḍa
maṇiyageyi navilamattarēḷaṟa bhuje paḍuva 23 baḍaga 72 . mūḍa 23 teṁka 64 . mattaṁ herggeṟeyiṁ baḍagaṇa hāḷa
ha(ṁ)nnasinalli navilumattarēḷu karmma 619 Abhuje paḍuva 96 baḍaga 29 . mūḍa 91 teṁka 13 © bōvimayyaṁgaḷa maga
sōvimayyaṁge varggabiṭṭa keyiṁ baḍḍagivoladiṁ pattire teṁka dēvaṁbolada baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuva nela kuṟugōḍa baṭṭe yirddeseya
lmāgi gajādharavannasinoḷage biṭṭa navilumattarāṟu kamma 675 ṟa bhuje paḍuva 123 baḍaga 98 mūḍa 18 teṁka 102
© baddemayyaṁgaḷa magaṁ mācigāvuṁḍa dēvargge biṭṭa keyi mūlasthānadēvara keyyiṁ pattire paḍuva dēvaṁbolada baṭṭeyiṁ mū
ḍa gāṇigageyi navilamattareydu kamma 415 ṟa bhuje pa 22 ba 69 . mū 16 . teṁ 61 Antu mattaru 37 kaṁ 136
© Ī sthānaṁ naiṣṭhikatapōdhanara sthānavilli kaccuṭaṁdolagida tapōdhanara sthānakke didanappaḍe svāna gārddhaba cāṁḍāḷa Intī dha
rmmamaṁ tappade pratipāḷisidarappaḍe śrīsvāmi kurukṣētradalu sūryya
grahaṇadaṁdu sahasra brāhmaṇargge sahasra kapilegaḷaṁ dānageyda phaḷamakkuvī dharmmavanaḷidanappaḍā tithiyalā tī
rtthagaḷalanibaru brāhmaṇarumananitu kapilegaḷumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvva
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā pāḷayaṁti vasundharāṁ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
pasarise nijakīrttilatāprasaraṁ viprakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ māḍisida śivadharmmadesakavesedūrjjitamakke nirutamācaṁdrārkkaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
